flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at George Fox University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.5k → $42.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at George Fox University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.5k → $42.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at George Fox University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
